race.comment: COSY CORNER (3) charged home to score over 1250m here in this grade two starts ago. Tackled a Midway over 1300m at Rosehill subsequently and produced a strong finish to be beaten under a length. Rock hard fit after three runs back and a return to the provincials might see a return to the winner's list. Rising nine-year-old LOCKDOWN GAMBLE (2) has returned in fine order this prep. Tired late to just miss the placings first-up over this course and distance then ran on nicely over the mile at Dubbo last time. Should be peaking now. THREE ARROWS (5) raced wide and kept finding in the run home to be beaten just 1.5 lengths in a blanket finish over 1300m at Warwick Farm recently. Lightly raced three-year-old with plenty of upside. SPIV (12) backs up seven days after leading for home only to be swamped near the line in a 1350m Wyong BM64. Beautifully in after Small's claim - might be hard to catch. TACT (6) is a likely improver following a decent first-up effort here a fortnight ago.
